# melbet-syria.net

Public landing pages for Melbet Syria in English and Arabic.

## Preferred URLs

- https://melbet-syria.net/
- https://melbet-syria.net/partnership
- https://melbet-syria.net/ar
- https://melbet-syria.net/ar/partnership

## Page Summary

- `/`: English homepage covering sports, games, offers, and support links.
- `/partnership`: English partnership page covering partner and agent routes, steps, benefits, and tools.
- `/ar`: Arabic homepage covering sports, games, offers, and support links.
- `/ar/partnership`: Arabic partnership page covering partner and agent routes, steps, benefits, and tools.

## Notes

- Default English URLs are unprefixed.
- The application also contains `/en` route variants, but the preferred English URLs are the unprefixed paths listed above.
